postingHistory.role: Vice Chief of the Army Staff

medicalInfo.medicalNotes: Declared martyred on 7th July 1999 in Dras sector due to combat injuries.

awards.name: Param Vir Chakra (PVC)
awards.description: India's highest military decoration, awarded posthumously for conspicuous bravery and self-sacrifice.
